questions.question: She _____ play the piano very well.
This book is _____ than that one.
She is the _____ student in class.
There aren't _____ eggs in the fridge.
I saw him _____ the bus stop.
If it rains, I _____ stay home.
Is this correct? 'He don't like cats.'
Is this correct? 'They are playing football.'
Is this correct? 'She has went home.'
Is this correct? 'Where do you live?'
Is this correct? 'I am studying English for two years.'
If I study hard, I _____ (pass) the exam.
Match the animals to their babies:
Correct the error: She <u>have</u> a car.
Correct the error: I <u>must to</u> go.
Rewrite correctly: i no have money
Rewrite correctly: he study english yesterday
Rewrite correctly: me and tom is friends

passages.title: The History of Chocolate
passages.content: Chocolate comes from the cacao tree. It grows in tropical places. The Mayans used it first. They made a drink. It was bitter. Later, Europeans added sugar. Now we love chocolate. It is sweet and delicious. Dark chocolate is healthy.

passages.title: Space Travel
passages.content: Humans have traveled to space. Yuri Gagarin was the first. Neil Armstrong walked on the moon. Now we have a space station. Astronauts live there. It is hard work. They do experiments. Mars is the next goal. It is far away.

passages.title: Renewable Energy
passages.content: We need clean energy. Solar power comes from the sun. Wind power uses turbines. Water power uses rivers. Fossil fuels are bad. They cause pollution. Climate change is a big problem. We must act now. Green energy is the future.

tasks.title: Task 1: Report
tasks.instructions: Describe the chart showing internet usage.

tasks.title: Task 2: Essay
tasks.instructions: Computers are essential. Do you agree or disagree?

parts.title: Part 2: Long Turn
parts.instructions: Describe a memorable journey you made.
